summary: Iteration 22 - Stripe Integration Testing Complete. All features verified: Payment links endpoint returns 6 links (3 plans x monthly/yearly), webhook processes checkout.session.completed events and updates user subscription, payment success page displays correctly with auto-redirect. Admin and driver dashboard regression passed.
passed_tests: Backend GET /api/stripe/payment-links returns all 6 links (3 plans x monthly/yearly) - PASS
Backend POST /api/webhook/stripe accepts events and returns {received: true} - PASS
Backend POST /api/webhook/stripe with checkout.session.completed event updates user subscription - PASS
Payment success page loads at /payment-success - PASS
Payment success shows 'Paiement confirmé' heading - PASS
Payment success shows go-to-dashboard button (data-testid='go-to-dashboard-btn') - PASS
Payment success shows toast notification - PASS
Pricing shows correct monthly prices: Solo 39€, Croissance 189€, Flotte Pro 489€ - PASS
Toggle to annual shows: Solo 390€/an, Croissance 1 890€/an, Flotte Pro 4 890€/an - PASS
Founder badge 'Tarif garanti à vie pour les Membres Fondateurs' visible (data-testid='founder-badge') - PASS
Admin dashboard shows all tabs (Vue d'ensemble, Cash-Flow, Chauffeurs, Litiges, Éco-scores, Abonnement) - PASS
Admin dashboard shows CROISSANCE badge after webhook subscription update - PASS
Driver dashboard shows Éco-score 85, Livraisons en cours, Terminées aujourd'hui - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe webhook is correctly registered on app directly (not api_router) to allow raw body access for signature verification
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is empty in dev mode, allowing unsigned events for testing - this is intentional for test mode
Webhook correctly determines plan type from amount_total (in cents): 39€=solo, 189€=croissance, 489€=flotte_pro
Payment links in LandingPage.jsx correctly append ?prefilled_email= when user is logged in
PaymentSuccessPage.jsx has 5-second auto-redirect to dashboard with toast notification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified Stripe integration: 1) GET /api/stripe/payment-links returns all 6 payment links (solo/croissance/flotte_pro x monthly/yearly). 2) POST /api/webhook/stripe processes checkout.session.completed events - determines plan from amount_total and updates user.plan, user.subscription_status, user.stripe_customer_id, user.stripe_subscription_id. Also updates subscriptions collection. 3) PaymentSuccessPage at /payment-success shows 'Paiement confirmé' with toast and 5s auto-redirect to dashboard. 4) Plan CTA buttons in pricing section open Stripe payment links in new tab with ?prefilled_email= appended. Note: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is empty in dev mode so webhook accepts unsigned events. Console shows Firestore permission errors but app functions correctly.

mocked_apis.note: Stripe webhook can be tested with mock events (no real Stripe signature in test mode)

pricing_section.founder_badge: VERIFIED - 'Tarif garanti à vie pour les Membres Fondateurs'

regression.admin_dashboard: VERIFIED - All tabs working, CROISSANCE badge visible
